meta.source: GC.n.0 (Databento, forward-filled, 2016-01-04…2024-12-31) + YM (DJIA futures, SMT partner, NY tz, data ends 2024-12-31)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: YM took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (GC short → YM low<pre_low; GC long → YM high>pre_high)
